description: Default context recipe for AIWizard macOS-app generation. Loads in priority order: framework scaffold > active memory > universal wisdom > framework-specific wisdom > feature manifest > user goal > recent history. Each layer skips cleanly when its prerequisite isn't available. v2 added active-memory layer (Phase MA.3). v3 adds excludeTitlePatterns to drop CCAA / AgentRuntime / ScheduledJob log spam from retrieval results — the FTS5 index includes 9000+ historical agent log entries that are noise for context injection.
